props.ChoiceText: The animals sickened, and you learned how quickly routine work becomes desperate improvisation.
props.ChoiceBio: Livestock sickness taught you to improvise when patient work turned suddenly desperate.

0.TransitionText: Because livestock sickness taught you to improvise when patient work turned suddenly desperate, your life tightened around weather, land, and the stubborn labor of farming.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Farmer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because livestock sickness taught you to improvise when patient work turned suddenly desperate, bad seasons stripped you down to hardship, dependence, and bare survival.

2.TransitionText: Because livestock sickness taught you to improvise when patient work turned suddenly desperate, survival taught you to trust signs, remedies, and half-whispered village wisdom.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.
